title: Unified Operations Portal
challenge: A multi-branch services company relied on spreadsheets and disconnected tools to manage work orders, approvals, and reporting.
solution: We designed a centralised web portal with role-based workflows, audit trails, and real-time dashboards tailored to operational teams.
outcome: Manual coordination time reduced significantly and leadership gained consistent visibility across regions.

title: Field Service Mobile Suite
challenge: Technicians needed offline access to job details, checklists, and photo capture while working in low-connectivity areas.
solution: A cross-platform mobile application with offline sync, GPS check-ins, and structured service reports integrated with the core ERP.
outcome: Field teams completed jobs faster with fewer data entry errors and improved first-time resolution rates.

title: Inventory Intelligence Platform
challenge: A distribution business struggled with stock discrepancies, delayed replenishment, and limited forecasting visibility.
solution: Custom inventory software with barcode scanning, automated reorder rules, and analytics for demand patterns by category.
outcome: Stock accuracy improved and procurement cycles became more predictable across warehouses.

title: Customer Self-Service Hub
challenge: Support volume was high because customers could not track requests, invoices, or service history independently.
solution: A progressive web app with secure login, ticket tracking, document downloads, and notification preferences.
outcome: Support enquiries decreased while customer satisfaction scores improved after self-service launch.

title: Legacy ERP Modernisation
challenge: An ageing desktop ERP could not scale, lacked API access, and blocked integration with newer SaaS tools.
solution: Phased modernisation with a service-oriented architecture, cloud-hosted modules, and a migration plan for historical data.
outcome: Critical modules moved to the cloud with minimal disruption and a clear roadmap for remaining components.

title: B2B Ordering Platform
challenge: Wholesale buyers needed tiered pricing, bulk ordering, and approval flows not supported by a generic storefront.
solution: A B2B commerce platform with account hierarchies, contract pricing, and integration to accounting and logistics systems.
outcome: Order processing became faster and sales teams gained better insight into buyer behaviour and repeat patterns.

title: Compliance Document System
challenge: A regulated business required controlled document versioning, approvals, and traceability for audits.
solution: An enterprise document management application with workflow automation, digital signatures, and granular permissions.
outcome: Audit preparation time reduced and document retrieval became reliable across departments.

title: Analytics Integration Layer
challenge: Multiple product teams needed consistent access to customer and usage data without duplicating integration logic.
solution: A central API layer with standardised endpoints, caching, rate limiting, and developer documentation.
outcome: New integrations shipped faster and data inconsistencies across internal tools decreased materially.
